authors.author: Edith McNeill
Edith McNeill
Die Güte des Herrn hat kein Ende

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The steadfast love of the Lord Never ceases His mercies they never Come to an end

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: They are new every morning They are new every day They are new every morning Great is thy faithfulness Oh Lord Oh Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Great is the Lord And worthy to be praised Now and evermore I will bless His holy name
